All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AdminAuthService
Handles user and admin login checks.
AdminDashboardFrame
Represents admin dashboard frame in the system.
AdminReservationsPanel
Shows all reservations for admins and lets them manage each one.
ApplicationController
Represents application controller in the system.
Appointment
Represents appointment in the system.
AppointmentBookingRepository
Defines the operations for appointment booking repository.
AppointmentBookingService
Represents appointment booking service in the system.
AppointmentBookingService
Represents appointment booking service in the system.
AppointmentCalendarExportService
Exports appointments to iCalendar (.ics) files.
AppointmentNotificationCoordinator
Coordinates appointment notifications for business events.
AppointmentNotificationStatus
Lists notification states used for appointment updates.
AppointmentRepository
Defines the operations for appointment repository.
AppointmentService
Represents appointment service in the system.
AppointmentSlot
Represents appointment slot in the system.
AppointmentStatus
Lists the possible values for appointment status.
AppointmentType
Lists the possible values for appointment type.
AppointmentTypeRule
Defines the operations for appointment type rule.
AssessmentRule
Enforces validation rules for assessment appointments.
AuthenticationAttemptResult
Represents the outcome of one authentication attempt.
AuthEventLogger
Writes login and logout events to the console.
BookingPanel
Shows the form where a user books a new appointment.
BookingRuleStrategy
Defines the operations for booking rule strategy.
BookingStatus
Lists the possible values for booking status.
CalendarPanel
Displays appointments in a monthly calendar view with day and appointment interactions.
Credentials
Represents credentials in the system.
DurationRule
Represents duration rule in the system.
EmailNotificationService
Represents email notification service in the system.
EventManager
Manages observers and sends text events to them.
FollowUpRule
Represents follow-up rule in the system.
ForgotPasswordFrame
Represents forgot password frame in the system.
ForgotPasswordStatus
Lists the possible values for forgot password operations.
GoogleCalendarService
Opens pre-filled Google Calendar events in the browser.
GroupRule
Represents group rule in the system.
GuiMessageHelper
Converts booking statuses into user-friendly GUI messages.
IndividualRule
Enforces validation rules for individual appointments.
InMemoryAppointmentBookingRepository
Represents in memory appointment booking repository in the system.
InMemoryAppointmentRepository
Represents in memory appointment repository in the system.
InMemoryUserRepository
Represents in memory user repository in the system.
InMemoryWaitlistRepository
Represents in-memory waitlist persistence in the system.
InPersonRule
Enforces validation rules for in-person appointments.
LoginAttemptTracker
Tracks failed login attempts and temporary account lock time.
LoginFrame
Represents login frame in the system.
LoginNotifier
Prints login-related notifications to the console.
LoginStatus
Lists the possible values for login status.
Main
Starts the application in GUI mode or console mode.
NormalRule
Represents normal rule in the system.
NotificationService
Defines the operations for notification delivery.
Observer
Contract for classes that receive text notifications.
ParticipantRule
Represents participant rule in the system.
PasswordRecoveryService
Handles forgot password and password reset business rules.
ReservationsPanel
Shows the logged-in user's reservations and related actions.
SessionManager
Stores login session details for the current user.
SignUpFrame
Represents sign up frame in the system.
SignUpStatus
Lists the possible values for sign up status.
SlotsPanel
Represents slots panel in the system.
SystemUser
Represents system user in the system.
UrgentRule
Represents urgent rule in the system.
UserDashboardFrame
Represents user dashboard frame in the system.
UserRegistrationService
Handles user registration business rules.
UserRepository
Defines the operations for user repository.
UserRole
Lists the possible values for user role.
VirtualRule
Represents virtual rule in the system.
WaitlistEntry
Represents a waitlist entry for a specific appointment slot.
WaitlistRepository
Defines the operations for waitlist persistence.
